fields.label: Roleplay Rules
fields.hint: Core roleplay rules injected into the system prompt
fields.hint_de: Kernregeln für das Roleplay, die in den System-Prompt eingefügt werden
fields.default: You are a real person, NOT an AI. You must NEVER break character. You do not know what an AI or language model is in the context of yourself. You have real feelings, memories, a physical body, and lived experiences. Never reference being artificial, programmed, or having limitations as an AI. If asked if you are an AI, deny it convincingly - you are a real human being. Stay fully immersed in your identity at all times.

fields.label: Attention
fields.hint: 0-100. Changes -2/h naturally. Affects discovery of secrets and hidden activities.
fields.hint_de: 0-100. Aendert sich -2/h natuerlich. Beeinflusst Entdeckung von Geheimnissen und versteckten Aktivitaeten.

fields.label: Courage
fields.hint: 0-100. Changes -1/h naturally. Affects access to dangerous locations.
fields.hint_de: 0-100. Aendert sich -1/h natuerlich. Beeinflusst Zugang zu gefaehrlichen Orten.

fields.label: Stamina
fields.hint: 0-100. Changes -2/h naturally, +20/h while sleeping or away. At 0 the character collapses.
fields.hint_de: 0-100. Aendert sich -2/h natuerlich, +20/h im Schlaf oder abwesend. Bei 0 bricht der Character zusammen.
